feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Hanwen Zhang - Sophomore studying Computer Science at Sichuan University.

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome!

Hi there! I am Hanwen Zhang (张瀚文), a sophomore studying Computer Science and Technology at Sichuan University.

This is my first blog post on my new academic website. I created this site to:

  • Document my learning journey in computer science
  • Share projects and experiences as I progress through my studies
  • Connect with others who share similar interests in technology

About This Website

This website is built using the al-folio Jekyll theme, a beautiful and responsive template designed for academics. It includes:

  • An About page with my introduction
  • A CV page showcasing my education and skills
  • This Blog for sharing thoughts and updates

What’s Next?

I’m excited to start documenting my academic journey here. Stay tuned for posts about:

  • Programming projects and assignments
  • Algorithms and data structures learning notes
  • Interesting topics in computer science
  • Personal reflections on learning and growth

Thank you for visiting, and feel free to reach out if you’d like to connect!
entry.summary: My first blog post - Welcome to my academic website
